The '''''Liberty''''' was one of the [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] used by the [[Yevetha]] of the [[Duskhan League]] during the genocidal [[Yevethan Purge|Great Purge]] in [[16 ABY/Legends|16]]-[[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]].

==History==
Along with ''[[Honor]]'' and the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] command ship [[Valorous (Victory-class)|''Devotion of Yevetha'']], ''Liberty'' was one of the three ships of the Yevethan task force sent against [[Polneye]] at the start of the Purge. She was responsible for destroying the cities of [[Eleven South]] and [[Eleven North]] by orbital bombardment, along with one of Polneye's six defending [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE Interceptors]].

{{Ship-stub}}
